name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Hi team, meet Mindy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Hi team, meet my boss Mindy. (Yes, even United States Senators have bosses.)
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170213-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Hi team, meet my boss Mindy.

(Yes, even United States Senators have bosses.)

Back in 2011, I had never run for office before -- not even student council. And a popular, handsome Republican with $10 million in the bank held the Senate seat I was considering running for in Massachusetts.

I needed help -- so I asked around, and everyone told me that I needed to talk to Mindy Myers. Mindy is from Pennsylvania -- her dad was a bus driver and her mom worked at Sears (like my mom!) -- and she's also one of the very best Democratic campaign managers in the country.

I convinced Mindy to move to Boston, run my campaign, and teach a first-time candidate how to fight and win. Mitch McConnell and the Republicans may try to keep me quiet, but I won't stop speaking out and fighting back. And a big part of the reason for that? Mindy.

**I 'm introducing you to Mindy Myers because I have terrific news: She's agreed to become the Executive Director of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee to help all of our 2018 Senate Democrats fight and win.**

[**Let 's give Mindy and our Senate Democrats the best possible start to fight for a Democratic Senate and stand up to Donald Trump in 2018. Donate now to the DSCC.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170213-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I'm not going to sugar coat it: 2018 is going to be a tough election for us. Democrats are defending 25 Senate seats in the midterm elections -- 10 of which are in states that Donald Trump won in 2016. Republicans have to defend only eight total -- and only one in a state that voted for Hillary Clinton.

The Republicans have money and power -- and a 2016 playbook full of nasty attacks that they'll use again to deepen their control of the Senate in 2018.

That's why I'm happy that Mindy's taking the helm of the DSCC. She's smart and steady -- and she knows what it's like to take on tough fights and stand up to the powerful interests. My campaign wasn't just some fluke.

In 2006, Mindy helped our friend and climate champion Sheldon Whitehouse beat Republican Lincoln Chafee. In 2008, she led then-Senator Barack Obama's win in New Hampshire in the general election. And in 2010, she helped Dick Blumenthal beat WWE wrestling mogul Linda McMahon despite being outspent by $42 million. You read that correctly: her candidate was outspent by _$42 million_ , and she still won! And now she's going to help Senator Chris Van Hollen as he heads up the DSCC in this all-important midterm election.

But I also know this: Mindy doesn't win tough fights like this alone. And as hard as we fight, neither can our Democratic Senators. It's going to take millions of people all across this country to fight back against Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, the billionaire Koch brothers, and all the powerful interests. Grassroots is how we won in 2012, and grassroots is how we'll win in 2018.

[**The DSCC is fighting hard to protect Senate Democrats and take back the majority -- but they need your help. Please donate now -- whatever you can afford -- to give Mindy and our Senate Democrats a fighting chance in 2018.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170213-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec9f/2b07114c/457540ef/736aa57c/218853644/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec9f/2b07114c/457540ef/736aa57f/218853644/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec9f/2b07114c/457540ef/736aa57e/218853644/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Bad news and good news
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e1480d/1339554425/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all")
---

Peter,

Every day seems to bring us a new Republican low.

They've tried to silence Sen. Elizabeth Warren, voted to take away health care from millions of Americans, and confirmed completely unqualified nominees. The governor of Alabama just appointed a man who is _supposed_ to be investigating him for a sex scandal to the Senate, and that man is replacing the new attorney general, Jeff Sessions, who has been accused of derogatory comments and racial discrimination.

So where's the good news here? The good news is that pro-choice Democratic women are fighting back tooth and nail. They've asked tough questions of Trump's nominees, spoken out against the Muslim ban, and are a vocal minority in the Senate and House.

**But they need reinforcements -- and the majority. The best way to send them support is to donate $3 to become an EMILY's List member for 2017 during February membership week:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/February-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e1480e/1339554425/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFebruaryMembersh&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all")**

Together, we've done incredible things: electing historic numbers of pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate, House, and state offices across the country. Become an EMILY's List member for 2017 to make sure we keep it up.

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e1480f/1339554425/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e14808/1339554425/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e14809/1339554425/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7379/24c69fd9/f8e18f82/18e1480a/1339554425/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFR212N_digital_email_20170213_MembershipLaunch_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Tell Bibi this is what justice looks like
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is visiting the White House on Wednesday. Both he and President Trump are shamefully advancing bigoted agendas in Palestine and in the United States that are antithetical to peace, equality, justice, freedom, and all the values we stand for.
[**Join us on Wednesday, February 15 from 5 to 7 p.m. in front of the White House to demand justice in Palestine and an end to xenophobic policies.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004135/2635735325/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gplr9x/?source=em170213-DC-SubA")
Our Revolution is joining with our allies including the Arab American Institute, the U.S. Campaign for Palestinian Rights, Palestine Legal, American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee, The Jerusalem Fund, ArabAmerica.com, the Network of Arab American Professionals, American Federation of Ramallah, Palestine, and the National Arab American Women's Association to demand peace and justice.
[**Tell Trump and Netanyahu that this is what justice looks like -- join us on Wednesday, February 15 from 5 to 7 p.m.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004135/2635735325/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gplr9x/?source=em170213-DC-SubA")
We hope to see you there,
The Team at OurRevolution.com
**[RSVP to attend»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004135/2635735325/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gplr9x/?source=em170213-DC-SubA")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004132/2635735325/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004133/2635735325/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a36/43f17890/207b9bd9/62004130/2635735325/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: DNC War Room
subject: Demand an investigation into Trump's ties to Russia (add your name)
body:
Tell the GOP to demand an independent investigation into Trump's ties with Russia
---
**Add your name: tell the GOP to demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd")**
Last night, hours after Kellyanne Conway went on national TV and said that Michael Flynn had Trump's full support, Flynn resigned.

**[Flynn may be gone, but the problem is not. We still need an independent investigation into Donald Trump's connections with Russia -- immediately.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Flynn+may+be+gone+but+the+problem+is+not&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd")**

We still don't know why Flynn was communicating with Russia during the campaign. And when he undermined U.S. sanctions imposed by President Obama, was it a reward for Russia interfering in the election to help Trump win?

What did Donald Trump know, and when did he know it?

Until we have all the answers, there will be dark cloud hanging over this election, the Trump administration, and our country. The American people deserve to know what happened and what steps our government is taking to ensure it never happens again.

**More than 47,000 supporters have already signed on to call for an independent investigation into the Trump administration's ties to Russia -- add your name right now to join them:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

\-------- Forwarded message -------
Sender: Democrats.org
Sent: Mon, Feb 13, 2017
Subject: re: Michael Flynn and Russia

Friend --

Over the weekend, some big news broke about Trump's National Security Advisor, Michael Flynn. According to reports, Flynn had been having conversations with the Russian government during the campaign while Russia was actively trying to help Trump win and was already discussing U.S. sanctions against Russia before Trump took office.

Not surprisingly, Trump administration officials including Vice President Mike Pence had repeatedly lied to the public about Flynn's contacts with Russia.

You don't need a degree in foreign relations to understand what's happening here. Trump's campaign coordinated with the Russian government, and after Trump won the election, Trump installed Putin allies like Michael Flynn and Rex Tillerson in his administration.

And by refusing to release his tax returns, Trump is hiding the true extent of his financial ties to Russia.

**[The American people deserve answers. That's why Congressional Democrats are calling for an independent review of this administration's connections to Russia.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+The+American+people+deserve+answers+That&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd")**

But Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell, along with the majority of Republicans in Congress, are refusing to investigate. As long as they can enact their radical agenda of giving your hard-earned tax dollars away to the rich and taking health care away from tens of millions, they're apparently willing to turn a blind eye to Trump's coordination with Russia.

**The only way we can know for sure that Trump and his team are putting America before Russia is to reveal how deep these connections go. Add your name to tell Republican leaders in Congress that you demand an independent investigation into the Trump administration's ties with Russia:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b8/4067b0a/2cd1cd561/7e7ac273/2086930112/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b8/4067b0a/2cd1cd561/7e7ac270/2086930112/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b8/4067b0a/2cd1cd561/7e7ac271/2086930112/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b8/4067b0a/2cd1cd561/7e7ac27e/2086930112/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_dnc_nd&source=em_20170214_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We've learned that HB2 could cost North Carolina the opportunity to host NCAA championships for the next six years. That's up to $500 million dollars.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120294a/2fde7c66/439b561e/156912dd/2554294947/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-it-s-time-for-hb2-to-go?utm_campaign=em17_170214_hb2cmp_adv_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170214_hb2cmp_advgq_ful_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Last week, we learned that HB2 could cost North Carolina the opportunity to host NCAA championships for the next six years. That's up to $500 million dollars. This is urgent. Today, I proposed a compromise on HB2 that would immediately stop the bleeding. **[The people of North Carolina voted for change in November and we can't stop fighting now. If you're ready to see HB2 go, add your name here:](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120294a/2fde7c66/439b561e/156912dd/2554294947/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-it-s-time-for-hb2-to-go?utm_campaign=em17_170214_hb2cmp_adv_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170214_hb2cmp_advgq_ful_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120294a/2fde7c66/439b561e/156912dd/2554294947/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-it-s-time-for-hb2-to-go?utm_campaign=em17_170214_hb2cmp_adv_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170214_hb2cmp_advgq_ful_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
This is about so much more than missing out on sporting events. This disastrous law has cost our state thousands of jobs and hundreds of millions of dollars. It legalized discrimination, and it has badly stained our reputation.
Right now, companies are considering bringing thousands of additional, good-paying jobs to North Carolina. But some of them are hesitant because of HB2.
We simply can't afford this law.
**[We have to keep fighting to show the legislative leaders that we will not stand for this anymore. Tell your legislators: "It's time to repeal HB2."](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120294a/2fde7c66/439b561e/156912dd/2554294947/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-nc-legislators-it-s-time-for-hb2-to-go?utm_campaign=em17_170214_hb2cmp_adv_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170214_hb2cmp_advgq_ful_rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thank you for your continued support,
Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120294a/2fde7c66/439b561e/156912dc/2554294947/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

"" | | "" This is about so much more than missing out on sporting events. This disastrous law has cost our state thousands of jobs and hundreds of millions of dollars. name: ACTION ALERT (via FlaDems.com)
subject: Trump + Russia?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Secure survey for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| After the Trump administration's repeated denials of wrongdoing, news broke last night that National Security Advisor Michael Flynn resigned over his misconduct with a Russian ambassador.

**But are Republicans doing anything to investigate other potential wrongdoing or security risks? NO.**

If National Security Advisor Michael Flynn spoke to the Russians and tried to cover it up, who knows what else happened. We NEED to know how far the Trump administration's ties to Russia go and if there has been any other misconduct.

**That 's why we want to hear from you, friend. Do you think a special prosecutor should be appointed to investigate the Trump administration's ties to Russia?**

| [YES](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-response-recorded?refcode=em021417&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+YES&utm_campaign=em021417&source=em021417") | [NO](http://act.floridadems. name: Democrats.org
subject: You've got Republicans running scared
body:
Keep fighting to hold Congressional Republicans accountable
---
**We're putting the pressure on the GOP -- and it's working! Now, let us know how you plan to keep up the fight.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Keep-Fighting1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd")**
You've got the GOP on the ropes.

Thousands of you have showed up at Republican members of Congress' town halls this month, demanding answers about their plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act. You've flooded the Capitol phone lines, calling on your senators to oppose Trump's nominees.

Here at DNC HQ, we just marked a major milestone: more than one million grassroots Democrats have taken action online in 2017. (This is the earliest we've ever hit that mark in any year -- ever.)

**[We're making our voices heard -- and it's working, but we've go to keep it up. Can you commit to keeping the pressure on the GOP?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Keep-Fighting1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Were+making+our+voices+heard++and+its+wo&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd")**

Trust me, Republicans in Congress are feeling the pressure we're putting on them. And they're running scared.

They've started to shut off their phones and cancel town halls in their districts. At a closed-door meeting, some House Republicans discussed plotting escape routes the next time they go home to their constituents.

More than a thousand Utahns showed up for a town hall hosted by Rep. Jason Chaffetz, chairman of the House Oversight Committee, and asked him to do his job. Chaffetz's only response was to dismiss them as paid -- even though reporters couldn't find a single attendee who had been paid to be there.

Republicans know their constituents are angry. But they also know there's a long time until the 2018 election -- 631 days! -- and they're counting on all that energy fading away.

**[The only way we stop the GOP from taking health care away from millions, rolling back Wall Street reform, defunding Planned Parenthood, and attacking our immigrant neighbors is if they think they will lose their seats over it.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Keep-Fighting1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+The+only+way+we+stop+the+GOP+from+taking&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd")**

So we have to keep up the fight. There are a lot of ways to stay involved: showing up at town halls or district offices, calling members of Congress, attending demonstrations, writing letters to the editor, signing your name to petitions, or making a donation to help Democrats fight back.

**No matter what you plan to do, make sure you're on record that you'll stand up to the GOP. Add your name right now if you're ready to fight:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Keep-Fighting1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b7/4067b0a/2ccdcbf69/7e7ac5d7/2563991666/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b7/4067b0a/2ccdcbf69/7e7ac5d4/2563991666/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b7/4067b0a/2ccdcbf69/7e7ac5d5/2563991666/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6b7/4067b0a/2ccdcbf69/7e7ac5d2/2563991666/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170214_ew_nd&source=em_20170214_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Keep fighting to hold Congressional Republicans accountable We're putting the pressure on the GOP -- and it's working! Now, let us know how you plan to keep up the fight. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170214ewnd&source=em20170214ewnd") You've got the GOP on the ropes. Thousands of you have showed up at Republican members of Congress' town halls this month, demanding answers about their plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act. You've flooded the Capitol phone lines, calling on your senators to oppose Trump's nominees. Here at DNC HQ, we just marked a major milestone: more than one million grassroots Democrats have taken action online in 2017. (This is the earliest we've ever hit that mark in any year -- ever.) "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+Were+making+our+voices+heard++and+its+wo&utmcampaign=em20170214ewnd&source=em20170214ewnd") Trust me, Republicans in Congress are feeling the pressure we're putting on them. And they're running scared. They've started to shut off their phones and cancel town halls in their districts. At a closed-door meeting, some House Republicans discussed plotting escape routes the next time they go home to their constituents. More than a thousand Utahns showed up for a town hall hosted by Rep. Jason Chaffetz, chairman of the House Oversight Committee, and asked him to do his job. Chaffetz's only response was to dismiss them as paid -- even though reporters couldn't find a single attendee who had been paid to be there. Republicans know their constituents are angry. But they also know there's a long time until the 2018 election -- 631 days! -- and they're counting on all that energy fading away. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=3+-+The+only+way+we+stop+the+GOP+from+taking&utmcampaign=em20170214ewnd&source=em20170214ewnd") So we have to keep up the fight. There are a lot of ways to stay involved: showing up at town halls or district offices, calling members of Congress, attending demonstrations, writing letters to the editor, signing your name to petitions, or making a donation to help Democrats fight back. No matter what you plan to do, make sure you're on record that you'll stand up to the GOP. Add your name right now if you're ready to fight: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170214ewnd&source=em20170214ewnd") Thanks, Eric Eric Walker Deputy Communications Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
